name: Sauteed Scallops on Red Pepper Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 small garlic clove, peeled and crushed
1 large red bell pepper, peeled, seeds and membranes removed
recipeInstructions:
1. To make the sauce: Place the garlic, pepper and 2 tablespoons of yogurt in a food processor fitted with a steel blade. Puree until smooth. Scrape the mixture into a small bowl and stir in the remaining yogurt, coriander, and black pepper. Whisk in the olive oil.
2. To cook the scallops: Spray a medium-sized skillet with non-stick coating. Add the olive oil and heat until hot but not smoking. Add the scallops and quickly saute them over high heat until just cooked through, turning often, 2 to 3 minutes. Pour in the vermouth and let it almost evaporate, then add the lemon juice. Cook a few seconds longer so the scallops are glazed.
3. Spoon the scallops onto plates with the sauce. Sprinkle with coriander leaves and serve at once.
